title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Periodontal Disease
description: Salvia officinalis essential oils contains bioactive constituents such as carnosic acid and ursolic acid, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help reduce the presence of bacteria and inflammation in the mouth, contributing to the development of periodontal disease.
